title: CTOV - Wares compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Wares mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Wares. You will find some warehouse in village. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Wares mod**

Wares mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/wares)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
